title: Tomas Finds Colors
synopsis: Baby Tomas discovers different colors by playing peek-a-boo with colorful objects around his house. Each page reveals a new vibrant color as Tomas lifts flaps and discovers red apples, blue balls, yellow ducks, and more. The repetitive structure and sound effects make this perfect for interactive reading with babies.

illustration.description: Cheerful baby Tomas with warm brown skin and curly dark hair sits on a soft cream rug, reaching toward a small red cloth covering something mysterious. His round dark eyes sparkle with curiosity and his chubby hands are outstretched. The background shows a cozy living room with pastel yellow walls and wooden toys scattered around.
illustration.alt: Baby Tomas reaching for red cloth hiding an object

illustration.description: Tomas holds a bright red apple with both hands, his face lit up with delight and mouth open in wonder. The apple is glossy and vibrant against the soft background. Gentle watercolor splashes of red surround the scene, and his caregiver's hands (with medium tan skin) are visible at the edge, encouraging him.
illustration.alt: Tomas holding a bright red apple with joy

illustration.description: Tomas crawls across the soft rug toward a blue blanket draped over a round shape. His expression shows excited anticipation with raised eyebrows and a small smile. The room has warm natural light streaming through a window, and diverse family photos hang on the wall in the background.
illustration.alt: Tomas crawling toward blue blanket covering mystery object

illustration.description: A large, bright blue rubber ball sits in front of Tomas as he claps his small hands together with pure joy. His eyes are wide with excitement and his mouth forms a perfect 'o' of surprise. Soft blue watercolor washes create movement around the ball, suggesting bouncing motion.
illustration.alt: Tomas clapping at bouncing blue ball

illustration.description: Tomas sits in a shallow bathtub, reaching toward a yellow washcloth floating in the bubbly water. His wet curls stick to his forehead and soap bubbles glisten around him. The bathroom tiles are soft mint green and a caring parent's diverse hands (darker brown skin) hold a fluffy towel nearby.
illustration.alt: Tomas in bathtub reaching for yellow washcloth

illustration.description: Tomas giggles as he holds a bright yellow rubber duck, water droplets sparkling in the air around them. His face radiates pure happiness with crinkled eyes and an open-mouthed laugh. The duck's orange beak is prominent and water ripples create gentle yellow reflections.
illustration.alt: Laughing Tomas with yellow rubber duck making splashes

illustration.description: Outside in a garden, Tomas sits on soft grass reaching toward large green leaves that seem to hide something special. Dappled sunlight filters through tree branches above, creating gentle shadows. His grandmother with silver hair and warm smile watches from a garden bench nearby.
illustration.alt: Tomas in garden reaching toward green leaves

illustration.description: Tomas points with one chubby finger at a friendly bright green toy frog sitting among real garden plants. His expression shows wonder and concentration as he studies the frog's features. Soft green watercolor washes blend the toy with the natural foliage, while butterflies dance in the background.
illustration.alt: Tomas pointing at green toy frog among plants

illustration.description: Tomas sits surrounded by all his colorful discoveries - the red apple, blue ball, yellow duck, and green frog arranged in a circle around him. His arms are raised in celebration, face beaming with joy. Rainbow-colored watercolor splashes dance gently around the scene, while his diverse family members peek into the frame with loving smiles.
illustration.alt: Happy Tomas surrounded by colorful objects with family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Tomas's apple?
questions.explanation: Tomas found a red apple when he played peek-a-boo!

questions.question: What yellow toy does Tomas play with in the bath?
questions.explanation: Tomas splashes with a yellow rubber duck in his bath!

questions.question: What sound does the green frog make?
questions.explanation: The green frog says 'Ribbit, ribbit!' in the garden.
